preconditions: Login page should display username textbox, password textbox, SIGN IN button, home navigation button and back navigation button

testCases.title: Verify login page loads with username textbox, password textbox, SIGN IN button, home navigation button and back navigation button visible
steps: Observe the login page layout and available controls
testCases.expectedResult: Login page loads successfully at URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined and username textbox, password textbox, SIGN IN button, home navigation button and back navigation button are visible and interactable

testCases.title: Verify successful login using valid username and valid password through SIGN IN button
testCases.expectedResult: User is authenticated successfully and browser redirects to home page with URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home and login page elements are no longer displayed

testCases.title: Verify login submission using Enter key from password textbox with valid credentials
steps: Press Enter key while focus is inside the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Form submission is triggered by Enter key and user is authenticated successfully and redirected to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify login fails when valid username is used with incorrect password
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected, a visible sign-in failure message is displayed and the page remains at URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined without redirecting to the home page

testCases.title: Verify login fails when invalid username is used with valid password
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, a visible sign-in failure message is displayed and user remains on login page URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined

testCases.title: Verify login fails when both username and password are invalid
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication attempt is rejected, a sign-in failure message is displayed and the page remains on the login URL without navigation to the home page

testCases.title: Verify login validation when both username and password fields are empty
testCases.expectedResult: Login is rejected and the user remains on the login page with a visible validation or authentication failure message and no redirect to the home page

testCases.title: Verify login validation when username is entered and password field is empty
testCases.expectedResult: Login submission is rejected, validation or authentication failure message is displayed and the application remains on login page URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined

testCases.title: Verify login validation when password is entered and username field is empty
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is not performed, a validation or failure message is displayed and the page remains at login URL

testCases.title: Verify password textbox masks characters while user types password
testCases.expectedResult: Password characters appear masked such as dots or asterisks and the actual password text is not visible on the screen

testCases.title: Verify login succeeds when valid credentials are entered with leading and trailing spaces
steps: Enter space hacklarr space into username textbox
Enter space Icstunnel1 space into password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Application trims leading and trailing spaces, authenticates the user successfully and redirects to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username and password contain only whitespace characters
steps: Enter multiple spaces into username textbox
Enter multiple spaces into password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Login attempt is rejected, visible validation or sign-in failure message appears and browser remains on the login page URL

testCases.title: Verify login using copy and paste actions for username and password fields
steps: Paste the copied value into username textbox
Paste the copied value into password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Pasted values are accepted correctly and user is authenticated successfully and redirected to home page URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify system behavior when SIGN IN button is clicked repeatedly during login submission
steps: Rapidly click the SIGN IN button multiple times
testCases.expectedResult: Application processes only a single authentication request and redirects once to the home page without duplicate navigation, duplicate sessions or visible errors

testCases.title: Verify navigation to home page using home navigation button from login page
testCases.expectedResult: Browser navigates directly to home page and URL becomes http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify navigation to home page using back navigation button from login page
testCases.expectedResult: Application navigates away from the login page and browser URL becomes http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home

testCases.title: Verify login behavior when extremely long username and password values are entered
steps: Enter a string longer than 200 characters into username textbox
Enter a string longer than 200 characters into password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication attempt fails safely without page crash or layout break and the login page remains visible with a sign-in failure message

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username case differs from the valid credential case
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails due to username case mismatch and a sign-in failure message is displayed while the browser remains on the login page
